CustomField.description: System-managed timestamp recording when the Level Assignment batch job last started processing Contact records. Automatically updated each time the batch job runs for Contacts. Used internally to track job execution history and determine which records may need reprocessing. Do not modify manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: System-managed. Timestamp of the last Level Assignment batch run for Contacts. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Last Job Start Time : Contact
